title: Sketchbook
description: Add sketches to your Books! Sketch a full scene, or "study" an entity via a Spyglass to draw it.
body:
[![Wiki banner](https://files.catbox.moe/8k3obi.gif)](https://z2six.dev/mods/sketchbook)

Ever wanted to write compelling books for your friends to read? Then you know what's missing: Sketches!

With this mod, you can add sketches of your scenes or entities to your book. I highly recommend also using the following mods:

- [Scholar](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scholar) (as shown in screenshots)
- [Timeline](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/timeline)

For a full overview of this mod, please visit: [z2six.dev/mods/sketchbook](https://z2six.dev/mods/sketchbook)

"Port to X?"

- I currently only port to other versions/modloaders on a per-commission basis.
